style.name: Baroque newsroom collage
style.description: Ornate editorial poster language with deep navy, antique gold, parchment, red accents and layered geopolitical news vignettes.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 法国点球淘汰巴拉圭，伊朗继任疑云、北约会晤、俄乌遗体交接、中俄军演、能源、山火和以色列司法同时升温
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界不是没有秩序，而是每个秩序都在被重新测试
zh-CN.headlineFull: 法国点球淘汰巴拉圭，伊朗继任疑云、北约会晤、俄乌遗体交接、中俄军演、能源、山火和以色列司法同时升温；世界不是没有秩序，而是每个秩序都在被重新测试。
zh-CN.intro: 过去24小时，世界杯窗口内只有一场已完赛：法国1:0淘汰巴拉圭，巴西对挪威截至05:00仍在进行。场外，伊朗举行哈梅内伊葬礼但新任最高领袖未公开露面；特朗普将在北约峰会期间会见乌克兰与叙利亚领导人；俄乌围绕遗体交接停火互相指责；中俄海军将在青岛外海军演；OPEC+继续增产；法国山火影响环法；以色列政府挑战最高法院裁决。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天这组新闻很像一张压力测试表：球场看临门一脚，政治看制度边界，能源和气候看系统韧性。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 世界像同时开了8个副本，问题是每个副本都不是简单模式。

en-US.headlineFact: France edged Paraguay as Iran succession questions, NATO meetings, Russia-Ukraine claims, China-Russia drills, energy, wildfire and Israeli courts all tested order
en-US.headlineView: the world is not orderless; every order is being stress-tested
en-US.headlineFull: France edged Paraguay as Iran succession questions, NATO meetings, Russia-Ukraine claims, China-Russia drills, energy, wildfire and Israeli courts all tested order; the world is not orderless; every order is being stress-tested.
en-US.intro: France edged Paraguay 1-0 in the only completed World Cup match inside the Beijing-time window, while Brazil v Norway was still live at 05:00. Beyond football, Iran's funeral ceremonies raised succession questions, Trump prepared NATO-side meetings with Ukraine and Syria, Russia and Ukraine traded claims over a local ceasefire for body handover, China and Russia announced naval drills, OPEC+ agreed to raise output, French wildfires disrupted the Tour de France, and Israel's cabinet defied a Supreme Court ruling.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Today reads like a stress test: football tests finishing, politics tests institutional limits, and energy and climate test system resilience.
en-US.doudouQuote: The world looks like eight missions running at once, and none of them is easy mode.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 姆巴佩点球送法国进八强，巴西对挪威截至05:00仍未完赛
zh-CN.headlineView: 淘汰赛最残酷的地方，是一脚点球就能决定一个国家的夏天
zh-CN.headlineFull: 姆巴佩点球送法国进八强，巴西对挪威截至05:00仍未完赛；淘汰赛最残酷的地方，是一脚点球就能决定一个国家的夏天。
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间2026年7月5日05:00至7月6日05:00，世界杯窗口内已完赛1场：法国1:0击败巴拉圭，姆巴佩第70分钟罚入点球，法国晋级八强，将对阵摩洛哥。巴西对挪威于北京时间04:00开球，截至05:00仍在进行，因此不计入本期完赛赛果。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 强队不是每场都踢得漂亮，但真正的强队能在难看的比赛里把门票拿走。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 巴拉圭把法国折腾得够呛，结果姆巴佩一脚点球：下班。

en-US.headlineFact: Mbappe's penalty sent France into the quarter-finals, while Brazil v Norway was still unfinished at 05:00
en-US.headlineView: the cruelty of knockouts is that one penalty can decide a nation's summer
en-US.headlineFull: Mbappe's penalty sent France into the quarter-finals, while Brazil v Norway was still unfinished at 05:00; the cruelty of knockouts is that one penalty can decide a nation's summer.
en-US.intro: Between 05:00 July 5 and 05:00 July 6 Beijing time, one World Cup match had finished: France beat Paraguay 1-0 through a 70th-minute Kylian Mbappe penalty and reached the quarter-finals against Morocco. Brazil v Norway kicked off at 04:00 Beijing time but was still live at the 05:00 cutoff, so it is not counted as a completed result.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Great teams do not always play beautifully; they still find the ticket in ugly matches.
en-US.doudouQuote: Paraguay made France suffer, then Mbappe took one penalty and clocked out.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 哈梅内伊三子现身葬礼，新任最高领袖未公开露面
zh-CN.headlineView: 权力交接最敏感的时刻，往往不是谁出现，而是谁没有出现
zh-CN.headlineFull: 哈梅内伊三子现身葬礼，新任最高领袖未公开露面；权力交接最敏感的时刻，往往不是谁出现，而是谁没有出现。
zh-CN.intro: 路透社报道，哈梅内伊三名儿子在德黑兰葬礼祈祷中现身，但继任最高领袖的莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊没有公开露面。伊朗正举行持续一周的国葬，遗体将前往库姆、纳杰夫、卡尔巴拉和马什哈德等地。这个缺席让外界继续关注伊朗权力交接的稳定性。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 国葬是悼念，也是政治舞台。站在灵柩旁边的人重要，没站出来的人更重要。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 这种时候没出现，比出现还容易让人脑补一整季政治剧。

en-US.headlineFact: Khamenei's three sons appeared at funeral prayers, while the new supreme leader stayed out of public view
en-US.headlineView: in a succession, absence can speak louder than presence
en-US.headlineFull: Khamenei's three sons appeared at funeral prayers, while the new supreme leader stayed out of public view; in a succession, absence can speak louder than presence.
en-US.intro: Reuters reported that three of Ali Khamenei's sons appeared at funeral prayers in Tehran, but Mojtaba Khamenei, who succeeded him as supreme leader, did not make a public appearance. Iran is staging week-long funeral ceremonies across Qom, Najaf, Karbala and Mashhad, keeping attention on the stability of the transition.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A state funeral is mourning and a political stage; who stands by the coffin matters, and who does not appear may matter more.
en-US.doudouQuote: At a moment like this, not appearing can launch a whole season of political drama.

sources.title: Mass grief in Iran at Khamenei funeral

zh-CN.headlineFact: 特朗普将在北约峰会期间会见泽连斯基和叙利亚领导人
zh-CN.headlineView: 一次峰会能不能止战，先看各方愿不愿意坐到同一张桌子旁
zh-CN.headlineFull: 特朗普将在北约峰会期间会见泽连斯基和叙利亚领导人；一次峰会能不能止战，先看各方愿不愿意坐到同一张桌子旁。
zh-CN.intro: 白宫官员称，特朗普将在土耳其北约峰会期间会见乌克兰总统泽连斯基，讨论如何结束俄乌战争；他还将会见叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉，并先与土耳其总统埃尔多安会面。峰会前，乌克兰、叙利亚与中东局势都被推到同一外交日程上。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 外交不是万能药，但在战场冻结时，能不能开启下一轮谈判，往往就看这些会面有没有实质安排。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 一场峰会排了好几个火药桶议题，主持人压力应该比门将还大。

en-US.headlineFact: Trump is set to meet Zelenskiy and Syria's leader during the NATO summit
en-US.headlineView: before a summit can stop wars, the sides must agree to sit at the same table
en-US.headlineFull: Trump is set to meet Zelenskiy and Syria's leader during the NATO summit; before a summit can stop wars, the sides must agree to sit at the same table.
en-US.intro: A White House official said President Trump is set to meet Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy during the NATO summit in Turkey to discuss ways to end the Ukraine war. He is also expected to meet Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa after meeting Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan, putting Ukraine, Syria and Middle East diplomacy on the same schedule.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Diplomacy is not a cure-all, but when battle lines freeze, the next opening often depends on whether meetings produce real arrangements.
en-US.doudouQuote: One summit has several powder-keg topics; the host may feel more pressure than a goalkeeper.

sources.title: Trump to meet Zelenskiy and Syrian leader at NATO summit

zh-CN.headlineFact: 俄方称乌克兰拒绝局部停火交接遗体
zh-CN.headlineView: 战争打到最后，连归还死者也会变成谈判筹码
zh-CN.headlineFull: 俄方称乌克兰拒绝局部停火交接遗体；战争打到最后，连归还死者也会变成谈判筹码。
zh-CN.intro: 俄罗斯国防部称，乌克兰拒绝在东部科斯坚季尼夫卡周边暂停炮击，以便俄方向乌方交接阵亡士兵遗体。俄方此前称已控制该镇，乌克兰否认并称仍掌控当地。路透社报道，乌克兰国防部和总参谋部暂未回应置评请求，因此这仍是俄方单方说法。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 战争最让人难受的不是只有输赢，而是连最后的体面都可能被卷进信息战。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 连遗体交接都谈不顺，说明这场仗真的把人性磨得太薄了。

en-US.headlineFact: Russia said Ukraine rejected a local ceasefire for handing over bodies
en-US.headlineView: when war drags on, even returning the dead can become leverage
en-US.headlineFull: Russia said Ukraine rejected a local ceasefire for handing over bodies; when war drags on, even returning the dead can become leverage.
en-US.intro: Russia's defence ministry said Ukraine rejected a local pause in shelling around Kostiantynivka so Russian forces could hand over fallen Ukrainian soldiers' bodies. Russia had claimed control of the town; Ukraine denies that and says it remains in control. Reuters noted Ukrainian defence officials had not immediately commented, so the claim remains Russia's account.
en-US.xiaziQuote: War is painful not only because of victory and defeat, but because even the last dignity can be pulled into information war.
en-US.doudouQuote: If even body handovers cannot be agreed, this war has worn humanity very thin.

sources.title: Russia says Ukraine rejected local ceasefire for body handover

zh-CN.headlineFact: 中俄海军将在青岛外海举行联合演习
zh-CN.headlineView: 所谓例行军演，真正传递的是谁和谁正在靠得更近
zh-CN.headlineFull: 中俄海军将在青岛外海举行联合演习；所谓例行军演，真正传递的是谁和谁正在靠得更近。
zh-CN.intro: 中国国防部和俄罗斯国家媒体称，中俄海军将于下周在青岛附近海空域举行联合演习，随后部分兵力将赴太平洋相关海域开展联合海上巡逻。俄方称太平洋舰队一艘巡洋舰、一艘护卫舰、一艘柴电潜艇和一艘救援船已抵达青岛。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 军演的重点不只是演什么科目，而是让谁看见：中俄安全协作正在继续外显。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 这类新闻表面写例行，实际大家都在看地图。

en-US.headlineFact: China and Russia will hold joint naval exercises off Qingdao
en-US.headlineView: routine drills often signal who is moving closer to whom
en-US.headlineFull: China and Russia will hold joint naval exercises off Qingdao; routine drills often signal who is moving closer to whom.
en-US.intro: China's defence ministry and Russian state media said Chinese and Russian navies will hold joint exercises in waters and airspace near Qingdao next week, followed by joint maritime patrols in parts of the Pacific. Russian reports said a cruiser, frigate, diesel-electric submarine and rescue vessel from the Pacific Fleet had arrived in Qingdao.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The point of a drill is not only what is practised, but who is meant to see the cooperation becoming visible.
en-US.doudouQuote: These stories say routine on the surface; everyone is really looking at the map.

sources.title: China and Russia to hold joint naval drills

zh-CN.headlineFact: OPEC+同意8月继续增产，霍尔木兹出口开始恢复
zh-CN.headlineView: 油价不是只看供需，也看航道、战争和谁愿意多开一点阀门
zh-CN.headlineFull: OPEC+同意8月继续增产，霍尔木兹出口开始恢复；油价不是只看供需，也看航道、战争和谁愿意多开一点阀门。
zh-CN.intro: OPEC+同意从8月起把产量目标再提高18.8万桶/日。路透社称，随着霍尔木兹海峡石油出口逐步恢复，油价因供应过剩担忧回落到战前水平附近；但海湾出口仍低于战前水平，能源市场仍在消化中东局势和产油国配额变化。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 能源市场最怕的不是单一坏消息，而是航道、产量、库存和战争预期同时变化。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 油价像情绪曲线，一会儿怕断供，一会儿又怕太多。

en-US.headlineFact: OPEC+ agreed to keep raising output as Hormuz exports began recovering
en-US.headlineView: oil prices watch supply, but also sea lanes, war and who opens the taps
en-US.headlineFull: OPEC+ agreed to keep raising output as Hormuz exports began recovering; oil prices watch supply, but also sea lanes, war and who opens the taps.
en-US.intro: OPEC+ agreed to raise output targets by another 188,000 barrels per day from August. Reuters said oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz were gradually recovering and prices had fallen toward pre-war levels amid concerns about excess supply, though Gulf exports remained below pre-war levels.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Energy markets do not fear one bad signal as much as sea lanes, production, inventories and war expectations changing at once.
en-US.doudouQuote: Oil prices are an emotion curve: first fear shortage, then fear too much supply.

sources.title: OPEC+ agrees August output increase as Hormuz exports recover

zh-CN.headlineFact: 法国山火迫使环法第三赛段禁止观众进入
zh-CN.headlineView: 气候风险不再只是天气预报，而是连体育赛事都要改运行规则
zh-CN.headlineFull: 法国山火迫使环法第三赛段禁止观众进入；气候风险不再只是天气预报，而是连体育赛事都要改运行规则。
zh-CN.intro: 法国官员称，因西南部山火仍在蔓延，环法自行车赛第三赛段将禁止公众到场。火灾已烧毁超过1600公顷土地，距离终点约60公里，现场出现浓烟、灼热地面和低能见度。赛事路线保留，但宣传车队不会进入最后40公里，车手仅由必要人员保障。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 极端天气正在从影响体验，升级成改变组织方式：旅游、赛事、工作都得重写预案。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前看环法是看爬坡冲刺，现在还得看风向和烟雾。

en-US.headlineFact: French wildfires forced Tour de France stage three to close to spectators
en-US.headlineView: climate risk is no longer a forecast; it changes how sports events operate
en-US.headlineFull: French wildfires forced Tour de France stage three to close to spectators; climate risk is no longer a forecast; it changes how sports events operate.
en-US.intro: French officials closed the Tour de France's third stage to the public because a wildfire in southwestern France was still spreading. The fire had burned more than 1,600 hectares about 60 km from the finish, with smoke, hot ground and poor visibility. The route remains unchanged, but the publicity caravan will skip the final 40 km and only essential staff will support riders.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Extreme weather is moving from affecting experience to changing organisation: travel, sport and work all need new playbooks.
en-US.doudouQuote: Watching the Tour used to mean climbs and sprints; now it also means wind direction and smoke.

sources.title: Wildfire disrupts Tour de France stage

zh-CN.headlineFact: 以色列政府称将不执行最高法院关于媒体监管机构的裁决
zh-CN.headlineView: 当政府公开挑战法院，真正被测试的是制度还能不能自我刹车
zh-CN.headlineFull: 以色列政府称将不执行最高法院关于媒体监管机构的裁决；当政府公开挑战法院，真正被测试的是制度还能不能自我刹车。
zh-CN.intro: 以色列内阁成员投票决定不执行最高法院关于广播监管机构的裁决，路透社称这引发外界对宪政危机的担忧。政府称相关委员会不满足法定成员人数，因而无权继续作出决定；但最高法院此前要求其继续运作。此举可能影响以色列电视台交易和监管安排。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 媒体监管表面是机构问题，深层是政府、法院和舆论权力边界的再碰撞。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 这不是吵架，这是制度在拉扯：到底谁说了算？
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：以色列司法。

en-US.headlineFact: Israel's government said it would defy a Supreme Court ruling on a media regulator
en-US.headlineView: when a government openly challenges a court, institutions test whether they can brake themselves
en-US.headlineFull: Israel's government said it would defy a Supreme Court ruling on a media regulator; when a government openly challenges a court, institutions test whether they can brake themselves.
en-US.intro: Israel's cabinet voted to defy a Supreme Court decision on the country's broadcast regulator, raising concerns about a constitutional crisis. The government says the regulator lacks the legal membership threshold, while the court had ordered it to continue operating. The move may affect television deals and regulatory arrangements.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Media regulation looks institutional on the surface, but underneath it is a clash over government, courts and public opinion.
en-US.doudouQuote: This is not just an argument; it is the system pulling on itself over who gets the final say.

sources.title: Israel cabinet defies Supreme Court decision on broadcast regulator
